name: Double Edged
author: Poki
description: Grab your sword and get ready to jump into battles of mythological scale in Double Edged! In this action-fueled beat-em-up game, you will have to defeat the waves of enemies coming at you with your trusty sword. Be careful however! Strong enemies can hit you so hart you drop your sword - making it harder for you to hit them! Got a friend around? Then you can play together and see if you can beat all 12 levels! Are you the true Spartan that can beat Double Edged? How to play Double Edged? Use the Arrow Keys to move around! Use the N key to slash your sword! Use the M key to jump! Who created Double Edged? Double Edged was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Numbskull , Gunbrick and Skywire ! How can I play Double Edged for free? You can play Double Edged for free on Poki. Can I play Double Edged on mobile devices and desktop? Double Edged can be played on your computer. Can I play Double Edged with my friend? Yes! Double Edged is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
